name: Iso11783IL_SetNodeProperty
title: Iso11783IL_SetNodeProperty
syntax: long Iso11783IL_SetNodeProperty( char propertyName[], long propertyValue);

parameters.name: Property Value
parameters.description: Description Value Range Initial Value

parameters.name: BAM_DT_Interval
parameters.description: Defines the interval time (in millisec) between each TP DT packet (for BAM transmitting). 1..3600000 50 ms

parameters.name: CTSLatency
parameters.description: Defines the interval time (in millisec) between the TP.CM_RTS and TP.CM_CTS (for the receiver of the CMDT transmitting). 1..1249 0 ms

parameters.name: EoMALatency
parameters.description: Defines the interval time (in millisec) between the last TP.DT and TP.CM_ EndOfMsgACK (for the receiver of the CMDT transmitting). 1..1249 0 ms

parameters.name: AbortLatency
parameters.description: Defines delay (in millisec) for sending the TP.Conn_Abort message (for both the sender and the receiver of the CMDT transmission). 1..199 0 ms

parameters.name: TPDTLatency
parameters.description: Defines delay (im millisec) when sending each TP.DT message (for the transmitter of the CMDT transmitting). 1..199 0 ms

parameters.name: Max_Transport_Size
parameters.description: Maximum number of bytes, which can be transferred. 9..117440505 100 MByte

parameters.name: Packets_Per_CTS
parameters.description: Number of packets, which are requested by CTS. 1..255 16

parameters.name: Packets_Per_RTS
parameters.description: Number of packets, which is used with RTS. 1..255 255

parameters.name: Packets_Per_Sequence_Ex
parameters.description: Number of packets, which are requested by ECTS (Extended TP). 1..255 64

parameters.name: BAM_with_Destination
parameters.description: Target address, which is used for BAM. 0: Target address is 0xFF 1: Specific target address is used 0..1 0

parameters.name: Max_Number_Of_Requested_Retransmissions
parameters.description: Maximal number of retransmission that the interaction layer supports. (Retransmission can be requested by the message TP.CM_CTS). 1..100000 2

parameters.name: TP_Priority
parameters.description: Priority used by the transport protocol. 0..7 7

parameters.name: AAC
parameters.description: Arbitrary Address Capable field of J1939 NAME 0..1 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939AAC

parameters.name: IndustryGroup
parameters.description: Industry Group field of J1939 NAME 0..7 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939IndustryGroup

parameters.name: VehicleSystemInstance
parameters.description: Vehicle System Instance field of J1939 NAME 0..15 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939SystemInstance

parameters.name: VehicleSystem
parameters.description: Vehicle System field of J1939 NAME 0..127 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939System

parameters.name: Function
parameters.description: Function field of J1939 NAME 0..255 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939Function

parameters.name: FunctionInstance
parameters.description: Function Instance field of J1939 NAME 0..31 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939FunctionInstance

parameters.name: ECUInstance
parameters.description: ECU Instance field of J1939 NAME 0..7 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939ECUInstance

parameters.name: ManufacturerCode
parameters.description: Manufacturer Code field of J1939 NAME 0..2047 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939ManufacturerCode

parameters.name: IdentityNumber
parameters.description: Identity Number field of J1939 NAME 0..2097151 Content of the database node attribute NmJ1939IdentityNumber
